utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh my God ! ! ! What are you doing ? ! !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You said , you wanna come in for some lemonade ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Whoa , ah ! ! We are you just gonna give me some lemonade ?

emotion_cause.span: 4_We are you just gonna give me some lemonade ?
4_We are you just gonna give me some lemonade ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I do not believe this ! When someone asks you in for lemonade , and to you that means they wanna have sex ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_When someone asks you in for lemonade , and to you that means they wanna have sex ?
7_When someone asks you in for lemonade , and to you that means they wanna have sex ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , not just lemonade , iced tea , sometimes juice .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , sorry , I just , I thought you liked me .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: It is okay . I suppose it could happen to anyone , not anyone I know , but ... By the way I can still see it .
